events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer JSON only. Need identify component/condition: Flanged joints, no torque marks/witness lines. Work rough-complete. Need decision fail because non-compliant? Let's reason.

Scenario: heavy industrial, flanged joints, no torque marks/witness lines. Torque marks/witness lines are required by many specs/ASME PCC-1 to indicate bolts have been properly tightened to specified torque and verified. Absence means cannot verify proper bolt-up; potential leak, joint failure. At rough-complete, should have been torqued. Condition installed-defective, non-compliant. Risk high (potential gasket blowout, leak in service). Decision fail. References ASME PCC-1 Appendix E? B16.5 maybe flange dimensions/materials. Need findings: no torque marks/witness lines on flange bolts; cannot verify bolt tension/torque sequence. Actions: mark/torque per spec, apply witness marks after verification, document bolt-up procedure. Percent complete maybe 80? value 0. Confidence high. Need JSON shape exactly. Include component_conditions ["installed-defective","non-compliant"]. Work_stage rough-complete. Risk high. Decision fail. Rationale. No prose outside JSON. Ensure valid JSON.

  "findings": [
    "No torque marks or witness lines on flange joint fasteners",
    "Cannot verify that bolts were tightened to specified torque or followed proper bolt-up sequence",
    "Joint integrity is unverified and may leak or fail in service"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Verify required torque values and bolt-up sequence from specification/drawing",
    "Retorque flange fasteners per ASME PCC-1 and project specification",
    "Apply torque witness marks after verification",
    "Document bolt-up completion and inspection"
  ],
  "rationale": "Flanged joints in an industrial piping system require verified bolt tension, typically demonstrated by torque witness marks. Absence of these marks means the joint was not properly closed out or inspected and is non-compliant, creating a high risk of leakage or gasket failure.",
  "references": ["ASME PCC-1", "ASME B16.5"]
}
